summary: Homepage performance remains persistently below 85 (score 75, LCP 6.2 s) with no structural fix applied; /about is still a near-blank placeholder and its SEO score (83) remains below threshold. All project pages recovered or held steady, with /projects rebounding strongly from 82 to 93.

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark contact footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page still contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on a near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Nearly blank dark page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements visible on desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, five project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar, Dependency Upgrade Planner) in a 2-column desktop grid with the fifth card left-aligned, and a dark contact footer visible on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 10/10 passing' badge, two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, amber disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

score_deltas: / performance 74 → 75 (+1 pt, within jitter — still persistently below 85)
/ lcp_ms 6467 → 6232 (-235 ms, within jitter — still critically slow above 6 s)
/projects performance 82 → 93 (+11 pts, strong recovery — back above 85)
/projects/note-structurer performance 87 → 91 (+4 pts, within jitter — stable above 85)
/projects/screenshot-to-primevue performance 85 → 88 (+3 pts, within jitter — stable above 85)
top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 6.2 s, performance score 75, persistently below 85 across many consecutive audits): preload the hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF at mobile-appropriate dimensions, and defer render-blocking resources above the fold — this remains the single highest-impact unresolved issue on the site.
issue_title: Homepage performance 75 (LCP 6.2 s) persistent regression; /about still empty placeholder with SEO 83
issue_body:
## Homepage performance remains critically slow — persistent, unresolved

The homepage (`/`) scored **75** on today's mobile Lighthouse audit (2026-07-17), with LCP at **6,232 ms**. The score has now been below 85 for many consecutive audits with no structural fix applied. The slight improvement (+1 pt, -235 ms LCP) is within normal jitter and does not represent a fix.

### Current metrics (mobile) — `/`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 75 | +1 pt (within jitter — still persistently below 85) |
| LCP | 6,232 ms | -235 ms (within jitter — still critically slow above 6 s) |
| CLS | 0.015 | stable |
| TBT | 123 ms | -56 ms (improvement) |

### Suggested fix
Preload the LCP hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF sized for mobile viewports, and defer render-blocking stylesheets/scripts above the fold.

---

## Still open — `/about` placeholder

`/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text "This is an about page" only — no nav, no footer, no real content). SEO score is **83**, below the 85 threshold. This is unchanged across multiple consecutive audits.

### Suggested fix
Build out the About page with real content, navigation, and footer. This will also resolve the below-threshold SEO score.

---

## Good news — `/projects` recovered
`/projects` rebounded from **82 → 93** (+11 pts) with LCP improving from 3,773 ms → 2,911 ms. This regression appears to have been transient. All project detail pages are visually intact and scoring above 85.
